title: coptis deltoidea
intro: Coptis deltoidea, also known as Golden Coptis or Huang Lian in Chinese, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Coptis deltoidea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for digestive issues and skin problems. In herbal preparations, Coptis deltoidea is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
